# jidonglab
> AI developer building tools, agents, and open-source projects. Weekly build logs, AI news analysis, and deep-dive technical articles in Korean and English.

jidonglab.com is the personal dev blog and portfolio of jidonglab — a developer focused on AI tooling, multi-agent orchestration, and build-in-public culture. Content covers Claude Code skills, MCP servers, LLM orchestration, and weekly project build logs.

## Site Structure
- Homepage: https://jidonglab.com
- Blog: https://jidonglab.com/blog — Technical articles and deep dives
- AI News: https://jidonglab.com/ai-news — Curated AI industry news analysis
- Build Logs: https://jidonglab.com/posts — Weekly project build logs (204+ entries)
- Projects: https://jidonglab.com/projects — Open-source project showcase
- About: https://jidonglab.com/about

## Content Categories
- Claude Code skills, hooks, and MCP server development
- Multi-agent LLM orchestration (AgentCrow, LLMMixer)
- Build-in-public weekly logs
- AI news analysis and commentary
- Token optimization (ContextZip)
- Game development with AI (UE5/C++ background)

## Key Projects
- AgentCrow: Auto agent router for Claude Code (npm published)
- ContextZip: Token compression for Claude Code (60-90% savings)
- LLMMixer: Multi-agent LLM orchestrator
- FortuneLab: AI fortune telling (saju) platform
- spoonai: Daily AI news newsletter and website

## Key Facts
- Author: jidonglab
- Languages: Korean, English (bilingual)
- Tech stack: Astro, Cloudflare Pages
- Content: 278+ articles (42 blog, 29 AI news, 204 build logs, 3 tips)
- Update frequency: Multiple times per week
- Also publishes on: DEV.to (ji_ai), Velog, Naver Blog
